---
title: "Open Access status of publications in time"
date: 2025-01-01
description: "Tracking how the open-access status of scientific publications has evolved over time."
categories: [data science, bibliometrics, open access]
---

As an ex-researcher and ex-consultant in the field of Higher Education and Research, I have
been interested for a long time in publications practices.

<!-- Add full project content here — analysis, figures, narrative, etc. -->
